examples: John continued to sleep so placidly on the floor that she allowed him to remain there.
"You really needn't fret, Ratty," added the Badger placidly.
The Toad's nervous terrors all returned, but the Badger only remarked placidly, "They are going it, the Weasels!"
All such disputes stir up intense nationalist feelings around the region, which makes it difficult for diplomats to settle matters placidly.
But he doesn't look for the market to placidly resume its rise.
